description: Ordinary class discovery, dry-run, update, release-8 compilation, and idempotence.
Final class discovery, source-preserving update, release-8 compilation, and idempotence.
Interface declaration update, release-8 compilation, and idempotence.
Enum terminator insertion, method update, release-8 compilation, and idempotence.
Annotation element update, release-8 compilation, and idempotence.
Expression and block lambda preservation.
Typed locals and explicit casts generate deterministic SAM signatures; one production signature refines inline lambdas; missing/ambiguous targets refuse before writes.
Static, bound, unbound, constructor, and array method references.
Default/static interface body preservation with direct declaration update.
Type-use and repeatable annotation preservation through update and release-8 compilation.
Scope-safe nested, local, anonymous, and secondary top-level type handling.
Generic bounds, wildcards, arrays, and varargs survive update, release-8 compilation, and idempotence; generated wrapper edge cases retain focused tests.
Local variable inference survives update, release-11 compilation, and idempotence.
Annotated and unannotated var lambda parameters survive update and release-11 compilation.
Private interface helpers remain untouched while a direct declaration is added.
Diamond anonymous class bodies remain scoped and compile at release 11.
Effectively-final try-with-resources survives update and release-11 compilation.
Module descriptors are ignored as subjects, preserved byte-for-byte, and compiled with the updated subject.
Collection factory, HttpClient, and Files.readString consumer behavior compiles and executes on Java 11+; existing profile tests reject older targets.
Record components survive direct member update, release-17 compilation, and idempotence; focused tests retain header-evolution evidence.
A multi-file sealed hierarchy survives subject update and release-17 compilation; focused tests retain sealed-interface evidence.
A top-level non-sealed subject remains in its hierarchy through update and release-17 compilation.
Abstract members remain unimplemented while a separate mechanical subject method is added.
Text-block masking with false braces, comments, quotes, and signatures.
Arrow and yield switch expressions survive update, release-17 compilation, and idempotence.
Pattern variables and compound conditions survive update and release-17 compilation.
Stream.toList, HexFormat, InstantSource, and RandomGenerator compile and execute on Java 17+; existing profile tests reject older targets.
Simple and nested record patterns survive update, release-21 compilation, and idempotence.
Type/record pattern switches with null/default arms survive update and release-21 compilation.
Guarded when cases with parser-adversarial content survive update and release-21 compilation.
A multi-file exhaustive record/sealed switch remains valid after one subject update.
SequencedCollection signatures compile and execute on Java 21+; existing profile tests reject older targets.
A joined virtual-thread behavior executes deterministically and leaves no live worker.
Unnamed catch/loop variables and nested unnamed record patterns survive update and release-25 compilation.
Validation before super invocation survives method and matching-constructor updates with order and hash stability.
Module import declarations survive update, release-25 compilation, and idempotence.
Compact source files compile but are ignored/refused as described class subjects without mutation.
Markdown documentation comments with fake structure survive update and release-25 compilation.
Stream Gatherers compile and execute on Java 25; existing profile tests reject the API below 25.
Only the described top-level type is inspected and updated.
Comments, strings, chars, and fake signatures preserve structural offsets.
Original CRLF line endings remain uniform through update and idempotence.
Absence of a final newline survives update, compilation, and idempotence.
UTF-8 BOM is preserved byte-for-byte during update; javac compilation is intentionally inapplicable.
Unicode identifiers and UTF-8 source survive update and release-8 compilation.
Existing tab member indentation is inferred for inserted mechanical methods.
Planned source equals the applied source for every covered update fixture.
Injected move failure retains original bytes and removes the temporary file.
Every covered update fixture requires a hash-stable second pass.
Unsafe compact-source update names the type/file/reason and fails before writes; profile diagnostics retain focused tests.
